data.title: Implement sprint-manual-drain.sh — manual-pause handshake script
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Implementation Notes
Create plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-manual-drain.sh (chmod +x after creation).

The script implements the manual-pause handshake for sprint. It is called by sprint/SKILL.md after the autonomous drain batch is exhausted, with the list of manual:awaiting_user stories passed as a JSON file path argument.

### Interface
- Argument 1: path to JSON file containing sorted manual story list
  Format: [{"id":"abc-123","title":"...", "instructions":"...", "verification_command":"..." or null, "deps":["..."]}, ...]
- Env var DSO_MANUAL_INPUT: when set, read input from this variable instead of stdin (mock seam for tests)
- Env var TICKET_STORE: when set, override ticket store path for tests
- Exit codes: 0=all stories handled (continue sprint), 1=one or more stories skipped (skip propagation applied), 2=re-prompt needed

### Cycle Detection
Before presenting prompts: check if any story in the list depends on another story in the same list (intra-manual cycle). If cycle found: output "CYCLE_DETECTED: stories <id1> and <id2> have a mutual dependency" and exit non-zero with diagnostic.

### Per-Story Handshake Loop
For each story in order (pre-sorted by caller):
1. Present blocking prompt:
   --- Manual Step Required ---
   Story: <title>
   Instructions: <instructions from story done definition>
   Verification: <verification_command or "(none — confirmation token required)">
   Enter: done | done <story-id> | skip
   ---
2. Read input from DSO_MANUAL_INPUT (if set, split on newlines and consume one line) or stdin
3. Dispatch input:
   - "skip": write MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL sentinel with handshake_outcome=skip, mark transitive dependents as waiting-on-skipped, return exit 1 after all stories processed
   - "done <story-id>": only process the named story; defer others
   - "done": process current story
4. For "done" with verification_command:
   a. Dangerous-pattern re-check: reject if command matches block-list (rm -rf, eval, sudo, curl | bash, wget | sh, etc.)
   b. Length check: reject if len(command) > 500 (configurable via MANUAL_CMD_MAX_LEN)
   c. Log command text to ticket: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <story-id> "MANUAL_VERIFICATION_PRE_EXEC: <command_text>"
   d. Run in constrained subshell: timeout ${TIMEOUT:-30} bash --norc --noprofile -c "<command>" 2>&1
   e. On exit 0: proceed to sentinel write
   f. On non-zero or timeout: re-prompt with failure output (output "Re-prompt: verification failed: <output>"), return exit 2
5. For "done" without verification_command:
   a. Prompt for confirmation token: "Enter confirmation token (any text to confirm completion):"
   b. Read token from DSO_MANUAL_INPUT (next line) or stdin
   c. Write audit comment: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <story-id> "MANUAL_CONFIRMATION_TOKEN: <token>"
6. Write sentinel: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <story-id> "MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL: <JSON>"
   JSON format per plugins/dso/docs/contracts/manual-pause-sentinel.md

### Skip Propagation
When a story is skipped: identify all stories in the input list that transitively depend on the skipped story. For each: output "SKIP_PROPAGATED: <dep-id> — waiting on skipped story <skipped-id>" and write a diagnostic comment on the dependent's ticket.

### Config Reading
Read timeout via: grep '^planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds=' .claude/dso-config.conf | cut -d= -f2
Default 30 if absent.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] sprint-manual-drain.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-manual-drain.sh
- [ ] test_drain_done_runs_verification_command_exit_0_proceeds passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh test_drain_done_runs_verification_command_exit_0_proceeds 2>&1; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] test_drain_dangerous_pattern_rejected passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh test_drain_dangerous_pattern_rejected 2>&1; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] test_drain_oversize_command_rejected passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh test_drain_oversize_command_rejected 2>&1; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] test_drain_sentinel_written_format_valid passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh test_drain_sentinel_written_format_valid 2>&1; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] test_drain_cycle_detected_diagnostic passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh test_drain_cycle_detected_diagnostic 2>&1; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] Script uses _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern (no hardcoded plugins/dso/ paths)
  Verify: ! grep -q "plugins/dso/" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-manual-drain.sh
- [ ] Script reads timeout from config with 30s default
  Verify: grep -q "planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds\|TIMEOUT.*30" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-manual-drain.sh
